title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Delhi University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Delhi University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
